headline: Blue Owl, HPS Join Private Credit Funds Stung by February Losses
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Private credit funds already under strain from heavy redemptions have a new pain point: losses in February are shaping up as the worst in more than three years.Two of the biggest retail-focused funds from Blue Owl Capital Inc. and BlackRock Inc.’s HPS Investment Partners joined peers in reporting negative returns for the month.Blue Owl Credit Income Corp., a non-traded business development company, lost 0.86% in February, according to Bloomberg calculations based on regulatory fil

headline: Oaktree To Fulfill All Redemption Requests In Its Private Credit Fund
summary: Oaktree Capital has elected to fully satisfy all redemption requests, representing 8.5% of its private credit fund for the first quarter.

raw.headline: Oaktree To Fulfill All Redemption Requests In Its Private Credit Fund
raw.summary: Oaktree Capital has elected to fully satisfy all redemption requests, representing 8.5% of its private credit fund for the first quarter.

headline: 'We've been through lots of highs and lows': BitGo CEO on crypto
summary: BitGo (BTGO) Co-Founder & CEO Mike Belshe joins Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman to discuss how crypto and bitcoin (BTC-USD) volatility is affecting earnings results and sentiment, while highlighting growth from new trading products like derivatives.

raw.headline: 'We've been through lots of highs and lows': BitGo CEO on crypto
raw.summary: BitGo (BTGO) Co-Founder & CEO Mike Belshe joins Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman to discuss how crypto and bitcoin (BTC-USD) volatility is affecting earnings results and sentiment, while highlighting growth from new trading products like derivatives.

headline: Private Credit Squeeze: Billions Trapped as Investors Rush for Exit
summary: ARES, APO, BLK, BX and OWL face pressure as $13B in private credit exits strain liquidity, leaving $4.6B trapped and exposing cracks in the $2T market.

raw.headline: Private Credit Squeeze: Billions Trapped as Investors Rush for Exit
raw.summary: ARES, APO, BLK, BX and OWL face pressure as $13B in private credit exits strain liquidity, leaving $4.6B trapped and exposing cracks in the $2T market.

headline: The Biggest Risk In BDCs, And How I Mitigate It As A Bull
summary: The current bear case for BDCs revolves around cockroaches, the SaaSpocalypse, and soaring defaults. Click here to read what investors need to know.

headline: ‘All bets are off’: European borrowing costs hit 15-year highs as investors brace for rate hikes
summary: Bonds issued by various European countries continued to sell off on Friday, deepening a rout that has been mostly continuous since the U.S.-Iran war began.

raw.headline: ‘All bets are off’: European borrowing costs hit 15-year highs as investors brace for rate hikes
